Question: I noticed a gap between [Company A] and [Company B]. Can you walk me through what you were doing during that time?
Your time at [Company] was relatively short. What prompted that transition?
When to Use: When tenure at a role was less than 1 year

Question: I don't see experience with [specific requirement]. How would you approach getting up to speed in that area?
When to Use: When a key qualification is missing

Question: You mentioned [specific accomplishment]. Can you tell me more about your specific role and what you personally contributed?
When to Use: When validating a strong achievement claim

Question: What was the most challenging aspect of [project/role] and how did you handle it?
Tell me about a time when you had to manage competing priorities with tight deadlines. What was your approach?
Describe a situation where you had to work with a difficult colleague or client. How did you handle it?
When to Use: Roles requiring collaboration or client-facing work

Question: Give me an example of a time you identified a problem before anyone else did. What did you do?
If you started this role and discovered the existing processes were inefficient, how would you approach improving them?
How would you handle a situation where your manager disagreed with your recommended approach?
When to Use: Any role — tests communication and adaptability

Question: Where do you see yourself in 2-3 years and how does this role fit into that vision?
What attracted you to this role specifically?
When to Use: Always — assesses genuine interest and alignment
